name: IdsEdwAplLvlNoteDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS ( SELECT a.APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cd.TRGT_CD,'UNK')='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(cd.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, a.APL_ID, a.LVL_SEQ_NO AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, a.NOTE_SEQ_NO AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, a.NOTE_DEST_ID AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, a.APL_LVL_SK, CASE WHEN a.NOTE_SUM_TX IS NULL THEN '   ' ELSE a.NOTE_SUM_TX END AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.APL_LVL_NOTE a LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd ON a.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=cd.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE a.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK>=@{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND a.APL_LVL_NOTE_SK<>1 AND a.APL_LVL_NOTE_SK<>0 ), cte_na AS ( SELECT 1 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS APL_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS APL_LVL_SK, '' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ), cte_unk AS ( SELECT 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS APL_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS APL_LVL_SK, '' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) SELECT APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, APL_ID, APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, APL_LVL_SK, APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, APL_ID, APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, APL_LVL_SK, APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, APL_ID, APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, APL_LVL_SK, APL_LVL_NOTE_SUM_TX, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_unk

Job Name: IdsEdwAplLvlNoteDExtr
